summary: ISS-1669 duplicates ISS-1614. EXP-268 P3 already replaced the brittle '16,439 km > 15,660 km' NN-tour claim with a hedged formulation ('shortest greedy NN ~12,400 km, longer routes ~16,400 km'), removed the unsourced 442-km band-width number, and made the area-coverage / 10^-27 chance-coincidence argument load-bearing in the time-distribution paragraph. Integrated d06d75d on 2026-04-27T22:05:10Z. ISS-1614 is closed 'fixed' at 2026-04-27T21:19:43Z. No further patch needed.
closure_reason: Duplicate of closed ISS-1614 (status='fixed', fixed_by=expansion-integration via EXP-268, fixed_at 2026-04-27T21:19:43.948Z). Both issues derive from the same curmudgeon review (monitor/curmudgeon/reviews/EXP-260-proposal.c1.json) and the same hole; the underlying patches are present in §4.2.7a HEAD (verified by text inspection, see EXP-274 verification block).
